character.name: Isometric pixel art character, 3/4 front-facing pose, 92×92 sprite. A shaven-headed ascetic warrior in saffron-gold monastic robes with one shoulder bare, cloth wrappings around forearms and shins, simple sandals. Prayer-bead necklace, crimson sash tied at waist. No weapon — hands held in a martial ready stance. Serene but focused expression, faint burn-scar on one cheekbone. Subtle gold chi-glow around fists. Palette: saffron gold #D9A441, deep crimson #8B2F1F, cream #F5E6D3. Limited 16-color palette, crisp pixels, no anti-aliasing. Dark fantasy MUD aesthetic.
